zh.lifeSummary: 當Marjory Ogilvy Countess of Crawford於1400年出生在英國蘇格蘭安格斯奧特豪斯時，她的父親Alexander Ogilvy of Auchterhouse Earl of Airlie28歲，母親Janet-nic-Andrew Gray of Broxmouth22歲。她於大約1423年3月與David Lindsay 3rd Earl of Crawford在英國蘇格蘭藍納可爾克勞福德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1476年在英國蘇格蘭藍納可爾克勞福德享年76歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marjory Ogilvy Countess of Crawford于1400年出生在英国苏格兰安格斯奧特豪斯时，她的父亲Alexander Ogilvy of Auchterhouse Earl of Airlie28岁，母亲Janet-nic-Andrew Gray of Broxmouth22岁。她于大约1423年3月与David Lindsay 3rd Earl of Crawford在英国苏格兰藍納可爾克勞福德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1476年在英国苏格兰藍納可爾克勞福德享年76岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ogilvy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Ogilvie
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Oglesby  , a habitational name from the barony of Ogilvie in Glamis (Angus), whose name is probably Pictish, of uncertain origin and meaning.

nameMeanings.name: Marjory
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual modern spelling of Margery . It seems to have arisen as the result of folk etymological association of the name with that of the herb marjoram ( compare Rosemary ). This word is of uncertain origin; its Middle English and Old French form was majorane, without the first -r-.

en.lifeSummary: When Marjory Ogilvy Countess of Crawford was born in 1400, in Auchterhouse, Angus, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Alexander Ogilvy of Auchterhouse Earl of Airlie, was 28 and her mother, Janet-nic-Andrew Gray of Broxmouth, was 22. She married David Lindsay 3rd Earl of Crawford about March 1423, in Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1476, in Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 76.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marjory Ogilvy Countess of Crawford est née en 1400, à Auchterhouse, Angus, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Alexander Ogilvy of Auchterhouse Earl of Airlie, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Janet-nic-Andrew Gray of Broxmouth, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé David Lindsay 3rd Earl of Crawford environ mars 1423, à Crawford, Lanarkshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1476, à Crawford, Lanarkshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 76 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marjory Ogilvy Countess of Crawford 1400 in Auchterhouse, Angus, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Alexander Ogilvy of Auchterhouse Earl of Airlie 28 und ihre Mutter Janet-nic-Andrew Gray of Broxmouth 22. Sie hat um März 1423 in Crawford, Lanarkshire, Schottland, United Kingdom David Lindsay 3rd Earl of Crawford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1476 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Crawford, Lanarkshire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marjory Ogilvy Countess of Crawford è nata il nel 1400 nel Auchterhouse, Angus, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Alexander Ogilvy of Auchterhouse Earl of Airlie, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Janet-nic-Andrew Gray of Broxmouth, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato David Lindsay 3rd Earl of Crawford circa marzo 1423, nel Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1476, nel Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 76 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Marjory Ogilvy Countess of Crawfordが1400年にイギリススコットランドアンガスアウチテローウゼで生まれた時，父Alexander Ogilvy of Auchterhouse Earl of Airlieは28歳，母Janet-nic-Andrew Gray of Broxmouthは22歳であった。約1423年3月にイギリススコットランドラナルクシュアイアクラウフォードでDavid Lindsay 3rd Earl of Crawfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1476年にイギリススコットランドラナルクシュアイアクラウフォードで76歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Marjory Ogilvy Countess of Crawford(이)가 1400년 영국 스코틀랜드 앤구스 오트하스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Alexander Ogilvy of Auchterhouse Earl of Airlie(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Janet-nic-Andrew Gray of Broxmouth(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 대략 1423년 3월 영국 스코틀랜드 랜아르크실르 크롤퍼드에서 David Lindsay 3rd Earl of Crawford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1476년 영국 스코틀랜드 랜아르크실르 크롤퍼드에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marjory Ogilvy Countess of Crawford nasceu em 1400, em Auchterhouse, Angus, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Alexander Ogilvy of Auchterhouse Earl of Airlie, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Janet-nic-Andrew Gray of Broxmouth, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com David Lindsay 3rd Earl of Crawford aproximadamente março de 1423, em Crawford, Lanarkshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1476, em Crawford, Lanarkshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 76 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marjory Ogilvy Countess of Crawford родилась в 1400 г. в местности аучтироус, ангус, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Alexander Ogilvy of Auchterhouse Earl of Airlie было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Janet-nic-Andrew Gray of Broxmouth, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени David Lindsay 3rd Earl of Crawford около марта 1423 г. в местности кравфорд, ланаркшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1476 г. в местности кравфорд, ланаркшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 76 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marjory Ogilvy Countess of Crawford nació en 1400, en Auchterhouse, Angus, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Alexander Ogilvy of Auchterhouse Earl of Airlie, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Janet-nic-Andrew Gray of Broxmouth, tenía 22 años. Se casó con David Lindsay 3rd Earl of Crawford aproximadamente marzo de 1423, en Crawford, Lanarkshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1476, en Crawford, Lanarkshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 76 años.
